rules.Name: Mercenary
rules.Text: This Ship may be used in any Fleet regardless of faction. When taken as part of your fleet, this Ship loses its Boardable and Civilian Transport rules.

flavour:
The Hyperyacht Somniferum is not a sight civilized governments want to see on situation reports. Colloquially known as "the party bus", a spike in crime and illegal substances usually follows in its wake. Somniferum's current owner is the "Master of Ceremonies" Maeby Hy. The Somniferum is almost unrecognisable from its initial configuration as an Eden Aerospace Systems Luxury Liner. Lab explosions, combat damage, and ad-hoc refits have all added to it's hodge-podge appearance.
One of these many changes to the ship is the addition of a peculiar weapon system. While it has no official name, the crew and any who face it have dubbed it "Party Poppers". This weapon system fires armour piercing fragmenting flechettes that disperse airborne narcotics and electromagnetic interference into its target. Far too small and numerous to effectively track, this weapon is able to bypass the majority of a ship's point defences and deliver strikes straight to the hull.
The Somniferum is rarely seen over combat zones, preferring to stick to those planets that are safe enough for civilian travel. While able to defend itself against small time competitors, the ship isn't built for combat. More often than not, the Somniferum will make a hasty exit from a planet as soon as it detects any law enforcement on an intercept course.
